criteria.description: Wiki tab: sidebar tree from /api/wiki/tree, plant-a click renders frontmatter + markdown from /api/wiki/file, Cmd+K opens palette, typing fires /api/wiki/search, Enter navigates, empty-query palette shows recents from shared/storage and does NOT fire search.
criteria.evidence: 2-commit branch shape (feat + docs). `pnpm test:e2e` on main after cherry-pick: 45/45 green (+7 wiki tests: tree render, file-on-click, Cmd+K visible, search fires, Enter navigates, recents-no-search, console-error sweep).

notes: Final pending frontend feature. All 22 planned features (15 BE + 7 FE) now on main. Next: contract-drift audit (real BE on :8001 vs MSW fixtures).
